title: digitaria sanguinalis var. horizontalis
intro: Digitaria sanguinalis var. horizontalis, also known as Doveweed or Buttonweed, is a perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Digitaria sanguinalis var. horizontalis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and soothing digestive issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
